_description: Rules applied per question for Portugal vs Croatia 2026-07-02

match_context.rule8_note: Draw 25.81% ≥ 25%. In practice, most Q here are direct market reads or counts, not 'more than' comparisons. Minor shading applied where relevant.

per_question.note: Ronaldo top shooter all 3 POR group games (3,7,3 shots). Liquid market mid 0.4168 used directly.
SOT OU1.5 Bruno Fernandes offer=0.2273 ×0.945=0.215. Cross-check from OU0.5 Poisson: 0.220. Consistent.
Modric S+A offer=0.2326 ×0.945=0.220. Modric not top shooter any game; role is playmaker. λ_modric_SA from Croatia λ×0.22 = 0.22.
OU2.5 Under mid=0.4466 = P(≤2 goals). Direct.
Croatia SOT OU3.5 Over mid=0.4167. ESPN: Croatia had 5 SOT vs ENG and 4 vs GHA, only 2 vs PAN.
Cards OU3.5 Over market mid=0.3216. Portugal group YC: 3,1,0. Croatia: 0,1,1. Combined avg 2.0. Market prices knockout premium.
P(POR≥1 card)=0.696 × P(CRO≥1 card)=0.789 = 0.549. RULE8 flag: competitive match, both teams likely to foul. Keep 0.550.
Portugal corners OU5.5 Over=0.4858. ESPN: Portugal corners [5,3,2] avg=3.33 in group, but market expects more in this matchup.
HT result Draw mid=0.3953. RULE8 fires → elevated draw probability is already priced. Use direct.
Portugal SOT OU4.5→Poisson λ=4.894→P(SOT≥6)=0.365. RULE12: bimodal SOT (9,1,2), removing UZB drops avg to 1.5. Market anchor used over ESPN raw avg.
Bernardo Silva SOT OU0.5 offer=0.3846 ×0.945=0.363. He takes smaller share of POR shots vs Ronaldo dominance.
No direct header market. Aggregated illiquid header scorer offers: Ronaldo(0.124)+Ramos(0.128)+Budimir(0.101)+others(0.10) → P(any header)=0.382. Shaded to 0.340 for illiquid bias.
Total shots λ=22.9 (from POR OU14.5 and CRO OU8.5 market fits). P(≥20|λ=22.9)=0.756. Conservative shade to 0.750.
To_qualify Portugal mid=0.7273. FTR Portugal win (57.97%) + P(advance via ET/PK) = 72.73%.
